infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ERL needs your location to find the fastest emergency responder near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ERL continuously updates your location so it can reroute to the closest responder.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ERL listens for emergency commands like 'Call ambulance'.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ERL uses your microphone for hands-free voice control during emergencies.
